care.summary: Compact tropical plant with round, striped leaves resembling watermelon rinds; pet-safe and easy to grow.
care.light: Bright indirect light; tolerates medium light
care.water: Water when top half of soil is dry; succulents-like roots store water
care.soil: Well-drained mix with perlite; orchid bark works well
care.humidity: Average to high; tolerates average home humidity
care.fertilizer: Dilute balanced fertilizer monthly during growing season
care.toxicity: Non-toxic to cats, dogs, and humans
common_issues: Loss of variegation in too-low light
tips: Use a terracotta pot to wick excess moisture
Avoid soggy soil at all costs; roots rot easily
Rotate weekly for even growth on all sides
